display.purpose: Site name on homepage only. Huge, tight, dramatic.

headline.purpose: Individual post titles on post pages.

title.purpose: Post card titles in the blog list.

body.purpose: All post body copy. Inter only. 65ch max.

label.purpose: Dates, metadata, tags. Uppercase, spaced, tiny.

motion.name: color-transition
motion.purpose: Hover state color changes on buttons, links, and post card titles.

motion.name: image-scale
motion.purpose: Subtle scale on post card photo hover.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Used for publish, submit, and primary CTAs.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #2A2520; color: #FAF7F4; padding: 12px 24px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 2px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 200ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #B5725A; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Used for secondary actions like Save Draft.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #2A2520; padding: 12px 24px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid #E5DED7; border-radius: 2px; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 200ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: #2A2520; } .ds-btn-ghost:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Navigation
components.description: Top nav bar. Cream background, site name in Fraunces.
components.css: .ds-nav { background: #FAF7F4; border-bottom: 1px solid #E5DED7; height: 56px; display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 0 24px; } .ds-nav-title { font-family: 'Fraunces', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 500; color: #2A2520; text-decoration: none; transition: color 200ms ease-out; } .ds-nav-title:hover { color: #B5725A; }

components.name: Post Card
components.description: Blog post preview. No container box — sits directly on the cream field.
components.html:
May 6, 2026

This is a post title

A short excerpt from the post body goes here, trailing off naturally…
components.css: .ds-post-card { display: block; } .ds-post-date { display: block; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #8A7F78; } .ds-post-title { font-family: 'Fraunces', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 500; color: #2A2520; margin: 6px 0 8px; line-height: 1.3; transition: color 200ms ease-out; } .ds-post-card:hover .ds-post-title { color: #B5725A; } .ds-post-excerpt { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9rem; color: #8A7F78; line-height: 1.7; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Form field for email, title, body.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 12px 16px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; color: #2A2520; background: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #E5DED7; border-radius: 2px; outline: none; transition: border-color 200ms ease-out; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #8A7F78; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #B5725A; }

narrative.overview:
This is a blog that feels like a working document — a script with pencil marks in the margins, dog-eared pages, a coffee ring on the cover. It's warm, personal, and a little wacky. Not designed to impress; designed to feel like her. The theater reference lives in the subtext: there's a sense of performance and timing in how content is revealed, but the costume never shows.

Fraunces anchors the voice — quirky, literary, expressive. Inter handles the words — clean and invisible. The cream field is never clinical. The terracotta is never loud.
keyCharacteristics: Fraunces for all display and headline typography
Warm cream (#FAF7F4) base, never clinical white
Terracotta accent at ≤10% of any surface
Flat elevation: no shadows, depth through tonal contrast only
Label style (0.7rem, uppercase, letter-spaced) for all metadata

rules.name: The Rarity Rule
rules.body: Terracotta appears on ≤10% of any given screen. It's a punctuation mark, not a sentence.

rules.name: The Never Cool Rule
rules.body: Every color tilts warm. If a new color is needed, it must lean brown or amber.

rules.name: The One Serif Rule
rules.body: Fraunces is the only serif in the system. Do not introduce a second serif.

rules.name: The Optical Size Rule
rules.body: At display sizes (>3rem), use font-variation-settings: 'opsz' 144. At title sizes (<2rem), use 'opsz' 9.

rules.name: The Flat Rule
rules.body: If depth is needed, step up the background tone. Never reach for a shadow.

dos: Do use Fraunces for every heading and display text.
Do set the homepage site name extremely large: clamp(3rem, 8vw, 6rem), weight 900, tight leading.
Do keep photos full-bleed with no border-radius.
Do use the label style (0.7rem, uppercase, Inter 500) for dates and metadata.
donts: Don't make it look like a generic Squarespace blog.
Don't make it slick or polished.
Don't make it look like a fashion magazine.
Don't use Terracotta for backgrounds or large blocks.
